name: dispatch
description: Dispatch a workflow to its bound worker (HTTP /run) or queue a durable handoff JSON.

args.name: reason
args.description: Free-text reason recorded in handoff payload

side_effects: live worker path: POST /api/pipeline/dispatch with {ip, stages:[<workflow>], schedule:'auto'}
no-live-worker path: write <ip>/handoff/<id>.json for offline workspace claim via /take
